blocks.text: Match preview: Kandy Falcons face Dambulla Sixers in 2nd Match (T20) on Sat, 18 Jul, 2026, 3:00 pm at Sinhalese Sports Club Colombo. Full pitch report, weather forecast, and squad details below.
Spin-friendly Sri Lankan tracks; deteriorate quickly on day 4–5 in Tests.
Drizzle · High 30°C / Low 26°C · Rain: 2.5 mm · Wind: up to 16 km/h. Light rain possible — overcast conditions could assist swing bowling early.
International playing XI is announced at the toss. Check back on match day for confirmed line-ups.
